title: Cadence Design Systems 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for Cadence fiscal 2025 revenue, net income, business description, and risk context.

title: Cadence Products
note: Official overview of Cadence's EDA, PCB, system design, and IP product portfolio.

title: Cadence Compute IP
note: Official source for Tensilica, Xtensa, DSP, NPU, and system IP positioning.

title: Cadence Design Systems Stock Price and Statistics
note: Market-data source for May 2026 market capitalization and P/E ratio estimates.

title: OpenROAD Project
note: Official project page describing OpenROAD as an open-source RTL-to-GDSII EDA flow.

title: The OpenROAD Project on GitHub
note: Public repository organization for OpenROAD source code and related project activity.

title: OpenROAD Initiative
note: Nonprofit context for open-source EDA support and ecosystem development.

title: KLayout
note: Official source for the open-source IC layout viewer and editor used in chip layout workflows.

title: CVA6 User Manual
note: Documentation for the CVA6 open-source application-class RISC-V CPU core.

title: OpenHW Group CVA6 GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository for the CVA6 configurable RISC-V CPU core.

title: VexRiscv GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository for an FPGA-friendly open-source RISC-V CPU implementation.
